Video.summary: Tony butts heads with both a tough cop who is overzealous in his handling of criminals.
Video.title: The Hatchet

Video.summary: McCall's ex-partner has gone bad. In an attempt to save him from prison, McCall and Hunter try to stop him.
Video.title: Hard Contract

Video.summary: Hunter uses a mobster's girlfriend as bait after she overhears an argument between him and his father.
Video.title: Legacy

Video.summary: A drug dealer is killed by a thief who stole Hunter's "backup" gun. McCall must clear Hunter's name.
Video.title: Pen Pals

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall help a girl who claims her uncle has died and all of his pigeons have been stolen.
Video.title: Flight On A Dead Pigeon

Video.summary: Tony is doubly stymied when identical twins both initially confess to the same murder.
Video.title: Two Confessions

Video.summary: A meek pick-pocket is accused of beating a woman. Hunter and McCall, unconvinced, must find the true culprit.
Video.title: A Long Way From L.A.

Video.summary: After the Commissioner's wife is murdered, Hunter and McCall piece together the clues to find the true killer.
Video.title: The Hot Grounder

Video.summary: During the holiday season, Tony investigates the murder of an elderly woman.
Video.title: No Greater Gift

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall work to stop a brigade of suburban mercenaries plotting to break a drug dealer out of prison
Video.title: War Zone

Video.summary: A serial killer has been mutilating the bodies of Eastbridge transients and homeless people.
Video.title: The Commissioner's Ball

Video.summary: Vietnamese gangs threaten Eastbridge and Tony steps in to help.
Video.title: Charlie Don't Surf

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali's friend and colleague, Chief of Detectives Irv Wallerstein, is struck down.
Video.title: The Fourth Man

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall are given 72 hours to find an attorney who falsified his death.
Video.title: Burned

Video.summary: When a beautiful, young Mafia wife is framed for the murder of her husband, she fears for her life, knowing that his mob boss father will stop at nothing to revenge his son's death.
Video.title: The Rabbit And The Fox

Video.summary: Armed robber Andy DuPree, has managed to allude authorities across the country and has once again returned to his hometown for his next round of scores.
Video.title: No Good Deed

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust an athletic beachcomber wanted for the armed robbery of a police van, he is blind sided by a female bounty hunter
Video.title: Dead End And Easy Money

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust his latest bounty at a railway station, the man slips from his grasp and the station, but not before stealing a car and killing the owner.
Video.title: White Picket Fences

Video.summary: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma but soon thereafter uncovers evidence of Calhoun's involvement in a much larger operation
Video.title: Endless Summer

Video.summary: By returning home to honor the one-year anniversary of his fiancee's death, Reno puts himself precariously close to Lt. Dixon's deadly clutches.
Video.title: The Hound

Video.summary: Reno may have met his match when Bobby sends him after a former heavyweight boxing champion turned convicted killer.
Video.title: The Champ

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby must rely on their maternal instincts when they find a baby left on their doorstep.
Video.title: Baby Makes Three

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby follow a bounty to New York City and experience the perils of being tourists while they track their quarry.
Video.title: Hound Downtown

Video.summary: After a nearly fatal accident, Reno loses his memory--and doesn't realize that Dixon is about to visit him in his hospital room.
Video.title: Stationary Target

Video.summary: Reno finds himself in the Old West when he encounters trouble in a ghost town.
Video.title: Rio Reno

Video.summary: Reno takes refuge in a commune but discovers an explosive situation there.
Video.title: Paradise Lost

Video.summary: Bobby's mother and cousin visit and set off a series of unwelcome, dangerous surprises.
Video.title: Love Hurts
